flashcards.front: What are the two directions processed by a Bi-RNN?
flashcards.back: Forward (left to right) and backward (right to left)

flashcards.front: Why are Bi-RNNs unsuitable for real-time applications?
flashcards.back: They require the complete sequence for processing, including future context which isn't available in real-time

flashcards.front: What is the most common way to combine forward and backward hidden states?
Name two common variants of Bi-RNNs.
